title: Cursebound
body:
Just a simple JJK Addon for the Palladium Mod, This was a commission which will be including 4 more powers to come. The powers which will be included in the addon include

Sukuna
Gojo
Yuji
Toji
Inumaki



Yuji's Powers are obtained through eating a Death Painting
Sukuna's Powers are obtained through Eating 20 Sukuna Fingers as Yuji
Gojo's Powers are obtained through eating Six Eyes
Toji's Powers are obtained through unlocking the Pact with the cursed worm
Inumaki's Powers are obtained through somehow eating a megaphone


It also adds in new fun armours you can use to dress up like your favourite characters from jjk

There is also a new advancement section for getting grades which increase the amount of abilities you can use
